page_metadata.biotools__summary: Protein oligomer structure prediction from a monomer sequence or structure. It carries out template-based modeling, ab initio docking or both depending on the availability of proper oligomer templates.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Protein oligomer structure prediction from a monomer sequence or structure. It carries out template-based modeling, ab initio docking or both depending on the availability of proper oligomer templates.
